name: Pov you made eye contact with an endercat for 0.01 miliseconds
description:
I estimated his height using this as a ref↓

and since nagi is 5'7 I put that into ↓

https://www.mrinitialman.com/OddsEnds/Sizes/sizes.html?base_ft=5&base_in=7&comp_ft=9&comp_in=0

and determined the height.

Also he will cannonically sit on your face

↓

Also as for the title I made it when I started making the bot but just couldn't think of a better title. So it sorta just stuck. Also he is based on the java edition enderman so that being said he can't move if you engage in a staring contest with him.. or at least shouldn't. Anyways have fun getting eaten.
